title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Sue Ryder Bad Limited
body: "Application number 4681  Applicant Sue Ryder  objected to the name used by Sue Ryder Bad Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 2 October 2024 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Sue Ryder Bad Limited is changed to 15350709, Ltd. "
